Tower Defense

A simple object-oriented tower-defense project with enemy movement, tower attack logic, game-state handling, a basic interface, and scoring.

Overview

a small Java tower-defense project built to practice object-oriented programming, game state, enemy movement, tower behavior, scoring, and a basic user interface.

What it includes

  • enemy movement
  • tower attack logic
  • game-state handling
  • scoring
  • basic interface
  • object-oriented structure

What it taught me

even a small game becomes easier to extend when movement, combat logic, state, and UI are not mixed into the same class.

Status

completed learning project

status

Completed learning project

platform

Desktop

technology

Java
